blogPosts.title: How to Sell Your Dental Practice: The Complete 2026 Guide
secondaryKeywords: how to sell a dental practice
blogPosts.metaDescription: A step-by-step guide for dental practice owners considering a sale or partnership. Covers valuation, DSO evaluation, equity models, due diligence, and how to protect what you built.
outline: Assess Your Readiness -- Financial health, owner dependency, personal timeline
Understand Your Options -- Private sale, broker-assisted, DSO partnership comparison
Get a Practice Valuation -- EBITDA methodology, market multiples, strategic premium factors
Evaluate Potential Partners -- Clinical autonomy, equity structure, PE track record, education
Enter Discovery Conversations -- What to ask, reference checks, site visits
Complete Due Diligence and Close -- Financial audit, legal review, staff transition, 60-120 day timeline

blogPosts.title: What Is a DSO? Dental Service Organizations Explained for Practice Owners
blogPosts.metaDescription: What is a DSO and how do dental service organizations work? An honest guide covering Gen1-Gen4 models, equity structures, and what practice owners should know before signing.
outline: Definition and history of DSOs -- from Gen1 to Gen4
How DSO models work -- management fees, equity, employment structures
Types of DSOs -- Corporate, MSO, IDSO, JV equity partnership
The consolidation landscape -- 1,000+ IDSOs, fewer than 100 qualified
What to evaluate -- autonomy, track record, equity performance, education
Red flags and green flags in DSO conversations

blogPosts.title: Dental Practice Valuation Guide: What Your Practice Is Actually Worth
secondaryKeywords: how much is my dental practice worth
blogPosts.metaDescription: How dental practice valuations work in 2026. Covers EBITDA methodology, market multiples (6-12x), factors that increase value, and common valuation mistakes to avoid.
outline: EBITDA: The metric that drives dental practice valuations
Current market multiples -- 7-9x for mid-market, 9-12x for groups
Factors that increase practice value -- growth trajectory, specialties, geography
Factors that decrease value -- owner dependency, declining patients, deferred maintenance
Common valuation manipulation tactics by DSOs
Getting an independent valuation vs. relying on the buyer's math

blogPosts.title: The Complete Guide to Dental Implants: Cost, Procedure, and What to Expect
blogPosts.metaDescription: Everything you need to know about dental implants: cost ($20K-$50K per arch), same-day options, recovery timeline, and how to choose the right implant specialist.
outline: What are dental implants -- types, materials, procedures
Cost breakdown -- full arch pricing, single implant, financing options
Same-day vs. staged procedures -- candidacy factors
The consultation process -- 3D CT scan, treatment plan, cost estimate
Recovery timeline -- week by week expectations
Choosing your implant team -- credentials, experience, technology

blogPosts.title: Dental Career Paths in 2026: From Associate to Partner to Practice Leader
blogPosts.metaDescription: A comprehensive guide to dental career paths in 2026. Covers associate positions, DSO vs. private practice, partnership tracks, specialization, and how to build long-term career value.
outline: The associate reality -- high volume, limited mentorship, production pressure
DSO vs. private practice salary and lifestyle comparison
The partnership track -- equity, leadership, clinical advisory board roles
Specialization pathways -- implants through Pikos Institute, CEREC mentorship
Avoiding burnout -- the structural causes and structural solutions
Building career value -- CE investment, peer community, equity participation

internalLinking.architecture: Hub-and-spoke topical authority clusters with cross-cluster bridges
internalLinking.totalPlannedPages: 75+ (6 landing, 5 pillar, 34 cluster articles, 10+ location pages at launch)

priorityPages.rationale: Primary conversion page for practice acquisition
Hub page for highest-value keyword cluster
Comparison/education page supporting all B2B funnels

rules: Every page gets at least 3 internal inbound links. No orphan pages.
Pillar pages receive links from all their spokes and pass equity to landing pages.
Cross-cluster bridges limited to 2-3 per article to maintain topical relevance.
No page should be more than 3 clicks from the homepage.
Vary anchor text -- 40% primary keyword, 60% natural variations.
